action sentence: Place the agarose gel into the gel box (electrophoresis unit).
Fill gel box with TAE until the gel is covered.
Mix the DNA sample with Loading buffer at 1:25 dilution ratio.
Load 5 μL of DNA ladder and samples into wells.
Run the gel at 100 V until the dye line is approximately 75-80% of the way down the gel.
Visualize the DNA fragments with LED.
